The '''Doornik-628 system''' was located deep in the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]], and was opened up to settlement in the waning days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It contained the planet [[J't'p'tan]], a place of refuge for the [[H'kig]] religious order.

{{System-stub}}
